item.name: Ka Puyhu
item.description:
A multitude of colors adorn the scales of this aesthetically pleasing wavekin.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: The Hanuhanu word “ka” means “rainbow,” while “puhyu” describes the state of floating. A fitting name for such a graceful, iridescent wavekin. For their part, the Hanuhanu appreciate the flavor and texture of this fish as much as its beauty─dining upon it during festivals and other worthy occasions.
